arts.ttl: I’m a former Aberdeen FC star who took down Aston Villa and now want to do the same to Chelsea
arts.sum: The Scottish midfielder will be up against the likes of Moises Caicedo at Stamford Bridge

arts.ttl: Gary Neville attacks Premier League after threat of barring Aston Villa from Europe
arts.sum: Gary Neville has accused the Premier League of behaving like 'bullies' in the face of a Football Governance Bill, which would see the establishment of an independent football regulator, under the new Labour government. The Premier League has hit back at Neville's accusations of acting like a 'bully', stating they are in ongoing discussions with the new government regarding the football regulator.

arts.ttl: Why Villa boss Emery is much more than a great tactician
arts.sum: There is a story from Unai Emery’s time at Almeria that seems so out of character that the initial assumption is that it cannot be true. This was his first ever fixture as a top-flight manager, a dauting trip to Deportivo La Coruna on the opening weekend.

arts.ttl: Pau Torres' confident Aston Villa warning should make Man City and Arsenal uneasy
arts.sum: Centre half Torres has been a revelation for Villa since joining the club from Villarreal - where he'd previously worked and won the Europa League under Emery - last summer and he proved to be a big miss at the heart of defence when he suffered injury issues in the winter. Torres also sees no reason why this new look Villa side, buoyed by the additions of Amadou Onana, Ian Maatsen, Ross Barkley and Jaden Philogene and set to welcome back Tyrone Mings and Boubacar Kamara from long-term injuries, cannot go one better than their fourth placed finish last season.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery has the perfect opportunity to end Aston Villa nightmare - Joseph Chapman - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: It'll be a low key return to the starting XI if he is indeed included by Emery at Adams Park on Tuesday night, but it'd also mark the end of a nightmarishly long wait for Buendia who is hunting an opportunity to secure more game time and to remind his teammates, who he is in competition with, that he remains very much a live selection option to the boss. If Emiliano Buendia is named in the Aston Villa starting XI at Wycombe Wanderers in the Carabao Cup on Tuesday night, it'll be the first time since a win over Tottenham Hotspur, in May 2023, that the diminutive Argentine will have begun a first-team game - that'll be 501 days on.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa set for dark flashback to the toxic day which provoked fury
arts.sum: Villa went ahead through Micah Richards in the first half, but Wycombe captain Joe Jacobsen - who only retired this summer having made 400 appearances for the club - equalised from the penalty spot in the second half. Villa, a side who hadn't won in 16 games and 109 days.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery teases Aston Villa selection plan and makes Wycombe admission
arts.sum: Unai Emery has confirmed that he'll be ringing the changes when Aston Villa go to Wycombe Wanderers on Tuesday for a third round Carabao Cup tie (8pm kick-off) - and admitting that the competition is perhaps the least of his priorities this season. BirminghamLive has launched its very own WhatsApp community to give you the opportunity to receive the latest Aston Villa news straight to your messages.

arts.ttl: Prime Minister addresses Champions League ticket prices as Aston Villa double down on decision
arts.sum: Prime Minister Keir Starmer says he understands the concerns of supporters who were left alarmed and angered by Aston Villa's decision to charge high prices for their forthcoming home matches in the Champions League. "It's for the club to determine the prices, Aston Villa or any club, but I do understand that the prices are going up and up and up and that's having a real impact on fans who want to go to the games."

arts.ttl: Newcastle to compete with Aston Villa for 20-year-old attacker after scouting him
arts.sum: Newcastle United and Aston Villa are keen on the Burnley winger Luca Koleosho. The 20-year-old has impressed in the Championship with the Clarets and it will be interesting to see if the Magpies decide to make a move for him in the near future. Newcastle have reportedly watched the player in action multiple times this […] The post Newcastle to compete with Aston Villa for 20-year-old attacker after scouting him appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Villa make it five wins from six
arts.sum: Fixtures Aston Villa Vs. Wolverhampton Wanderers - Sat, Sep 21st 2024, 15:00 Aston Villa secured local bragging rights over Wolverhampton Wanderers courtesy of a 3-1 triumph at Villa Park on Saturday. Wolves led at the interval courtesy of Matheus Cunha’s strike midway through the first period. But the Villans launched a second-half comeback and levelled through Ollie Watkins’ strike, before Ezri Konsa’s 88th-minute finish and Jhon Durán’s close-range effort swept up all three Premier League points. Ahead of kick-off, Villa Park united in tribute to Gary Shaw as a banner was raised in the Holte End showcasing his achievements and the stadium joined together for a moment’s applause, which was repeated in the eighth minute in honour of the club legend’s shirt number. You can view our gallery from the weekend below…
